summary: Tested Commercial Roof Assessment module — both backend (9/9 pytest passing) and frontend (full 5-step wizard + Deal Detail integration). All 8 backend endpoints work as specified (list/create/get/update/finalize/delete/pdf/email). Frontend list page, wizard editor, save flow, finalize, view PDF, and 'New Assessment from Deal' (button mounted on Projects detail page at /projects/{id}) all working. Found 5 data-testid naming mismatches between the spec and implementation that do not affect functionality.

minor.issue: If GMAIL_FROM_ALIASES doesn't contain 'assessments@sealtechsolutions.co' it falls back to first available alias — endpoint still accepts payload, may 500 from SMTP. Test tolerates both 200 and 500.

integration_issues.issue: Spec mentions a 'confirmation pill showing the linked deal name in Step 1' — no separate pill UI exists. The linked deal name is visible via the 'link-deal' select (option preselected) but no distinct pill element. Not a bug, just a missing UX affordance.

data_testid_mismatches.actual: priority-Low / priority-Moderate / priority-High / priority-Immediate (container has data-testid='budget-priority')

verified_functionality.list_page_elements: PASS - assessments-search, filter-all/draft/final, new-assessment-btn all rendered, KPI cards (Total/Draft/Final) present
verified_functionality.wizard_step_tabs: PASS - step-cover, step-scores, step-findings, step-analysis, step-plan all present
verified_functionality.step1_cover_fields: PASS - property-name, property-address, prepared-for, assessment-date, prepared-by, link-deal, link-contact, scope checkboxes all present
verified_functionality.step2_scores: PASS - 8 score-{key} blocks each with -slider and -num. Slider/numeric two-way sync verified (set num=82 → slider=82). Color coding verified: 82 renders green rgb(22,163,74).
verified_functionality.step3_findings: PASS - pick-aerial, block-R-1..R-5 all present. (pick-aerial shows warning if no deal linked.)
verified_functionality.step4_analysis: PASS (with naming mismatches) - positive-factors, negative-factors, rating-{High|Moderate|Low}, opt-option_{repair|restoration|replacement} all present.
verified_functionality.step5_plan: PASS (with naming mismatches) - forecast-1/3/5/10yr, priority-{Low|Moderate|High|Immediate}, immediate-actions, near-actions, long-actions, supporting-comments, expected-outcomes, conclusion, save-btn all present.
verified_functionality.save_redirect: PASS - saving creates and redirects to /assessments/{id}
verified_functionality.finalize_btn: PASS - clicking sets status to Final, header shows FINAL badge
verified_functionality.view_pdf_btn: PASS - opens popup with blob URL (auth fetch)
verified_functionality.deal_detail_integration: PASS - 'new-assessment-from-deal' button on /projects/{id} creates draft assessment linked to deal, redirects to /assessments/{id}/edit, link-deal preselected with the source project, prepared_for hydrated from linked contact's company_name.

action_items: OPTIONAL: align frontend data-testid names to spec (rating-* → restoration-rating-*, opt-* → option_*, priority-* → budget-priority-*, near-actions → near-term-actions, long-actions → long-term-actions). Functional impact: none; tests rely on actual names below.
OPTIONAL: add a 'linked deal' confirmation pill on Step 1 (Cover) when assessment is created from a deal. Currently shown only inside the link-deal select.
critical_code_review_comments: Email endpoint properly falls back when 'assessments@sealtechsolutions.co' alias is not whitelisted — clean implementation.
Update endpoint correctly preserves immutable fields (id, created_at, created_by_user_id) — verified via test_assessment_update_preserves_immutables.
Soft-delete integrates correctly with /api/trash/assessments + restore — verified via test_assessment_soft_delete_appears_in_trash_and_restorable.
AssessmentEditor.jsx is large (~1000 lines). Consider extracting Step components into separate files for maintainability.
PDF generation returns 8+ pages with marker text (property_name, executive_conclusion, primary_concerns) correctly rendered.
Deal-detail integration uses route /projects/{id} (not /deals/{id}); the testid name 'new-assessment-from-deal' still works but is misleading.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all functionality verified; 5 data-testid name mismatches, 1 missing pill UX)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test assessments (all TEST_ prefixed plus the UI/deal-detail artifacts). 0 active test assessments remain.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 backend endpoints + full UI wizard verified end-to-end. If main agent renames data-testids, re-verify only the 5 specific ids. Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_assessment.py and test_assessment_extras.py.
